_help.what: Deployment paths the workstation gates need. The harness reads only this file for the run's --root/--fileroot, the yaml directory, and the saved-emulator roots; nothing is hardcoded to one machine. Edit the values once on the workstation after `git pull`, then run `python gates/run_board.py --check`.
_help.rootdir: Absolute path to the cocoa $ROOTDIR (the clone root that owns projects/ and external_modules/). Used for cobaya-run and for resolving ROOTDIR-relative emulator roots. null = not set (preflight fails loudly).
_help.driver_root: The --root value passed to train_single_emulator_cosmic_shear.py (the deploy root that holds the run's dumps + outputs).
_help.driver_fileroot: The --fileroot value passed to the training driver (the run's file stem).
_help.yaml_dir: Directory holding train_single_emulator_cosmic_shear.yaml (the golden legs resolve it by bare name), i.e. the repo's example_yamls. Absolute, or relative to rootdir. The gate_configs smoke YAMLs live under gates/configs and are reached from here as ../gates/configs/<name>.yaml (single-yaml_dir limitation, flagged in the harness handoff).
_help.saved_emulator_root: Path root of an already-saved schema-v2 emulator (<root>.h5 + <root>.emul) for the save-rebuild-drift / cobaya-adapter round-trips. null = the save gate trains its own tiny emulator first.
_help.evaluate_yaml: The cobaya evaluate YAML for cobaya-adapter (defaults to the shipped cobaya_theory/EXAMPLE_EMUL_EVALUATE.yaml; edit its <run> placeholder to the real saved root).
_help.golden_bases: Per-gate pre-feature commit hash for the byte-identity golden leg, run in a TEMPORARY worktree (never checkout-in-place). ema-off-identity is preset to the pre-EMA commit. A null entry = the gate runs only its functional smoke leg and records the golden leg as skipped (see the harness handoff decision point).
_help.gate_configs: Per-gate bespoke smoke YAML (relative to yaml_dir). A null entry = the gate reports its config missing and is skipped, naming the file to author.
